notableEvents.label: Marcelo Mayer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Marcelo Mayer grounds into a double play, shortstop Brooks Lee to first baseman Josh Bell. Andruw Monasterio out at 2nd. Marcelo Mayer out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Error-assisted runs
notableEvents.detail: Masataka Yoshida reaches on a fielder's choice. Isiah Kiner-Falefa scores. Roman Anthony scores. Ceddanne Rafaela to 3rd. Masataka Yoshida to 2nd. Throwing error by second baseman Luke Keaschall. Fielding error by second baseman Luke Keaschall.
